description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsRed purse with foldover flap in frontFlap with magnetic button closure covers one zippered pocketBranding on front left cornerSlashing printing and top stitch detail on one side of the bagOne main compartmentSynthetic lining with zippered pocket and three card slotsLong silver coloured chain sling for carrying easeMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 17cmWidth: 29cm
